channel.title: GitHub Copilot Bulletin — English / Biweekly / Decision makers
channel.description: Latest GitHub Copilot updates for Decision makers (Biweekly, English)

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Biweekly #3 — March 10 to March 24, 2026 · Decision-Makers Edition
item.description: Over the past two weeks, GitHub Copilot's autonomous coding capabilities reached a new level of enterprise readiness. The coding agent is now faster, more transparent, and better integrated into compliance workflows — while a landmark long-term support commitment signals that GitHub is building Copilot for organizations with rigorous procurement and security review processes.

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Biweekly #2 — March 10 to March 24, 2026 · Decision-Makers Edition
item.description: Over the past two weeks, GitHub Copilot's trajectory has been unmistakably enterprise-first. From a new Long-Term Support commitment for models to measurable speed improvements in the coding agent, the platform is maturing toward governance, reliability, and ROI accountability — giving decision-makers the predictability and visibility needed to expand AI deployment with confidence. ---

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Biweekly #1 — March 2 to March 16, 2026 · Decision-Makers Edition
item.description: Over the past two weeks, GitHub Copilot has crossed a clear threshold: from developer productivity tool to enterprise platform. With 60 million code reviews completed, a new SDK for embedding agentic execution into applications, and enterprise-grade security architecture for agentic workflows, the signal is that Copilot is becoming foundational infrastructure — not just an assistant.
